title: Odontoglossum allenii
taxonomy: Odontoglossum allenii is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This epiphytic orchid species belongs to the genus Odontoglossum, which comprises approximately 220 species of orchids. Odontoglossum allenii is further divided into several subspecies based on its geographical distribution and morphological characteristics. The exact classification of Odontoglossum allenii may vary depending on the source and the most recent taxonomic updates. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Odontoglossum allenii shares characteristics with other orchids, such as showy flowers and adapted roots for epiphytic growth.
